_comment: DocLayout-YOLO class index -> project label mapping template.
_usage: Copy this file and adjust indices to match your model's class order.
Set 'class_map_path' in config to the path of your adjusted file,
Common DocLayout-YOLO class names (text/equation/image/...) are auto-mapped via _LAYOUT_LABEL_ALIASES in eval.py.
You can also use the raw model class names as values and they will be resolved via the alias table.
_export_command: # Export DocLayout-YOLO to ONNX (requires the doclayout_yolo package, install via pip):
# Note: exact import path may vary by package version; consult the DocLayout-YOLO repo README.
# Resulting .onnx file should be ≤150MB for the nano/small variants.
